name: I like to eat this either as it is, for a quick lunch or light supper, or with some
intro: some pan-fried salmon or topped with a soft-boiled egg.

ingredients.item: oz/200g buckwheat noodles (or green tea soba)
limes:  nely zest 2 to get 1 tsp, then juice 2 to get 3 tbsp; slice the  nal lime into 4 wedges, to serve
green chile, seeded and thinly sliced
ripe avocados, cut into ¼-inch/ ½cm slices salt
nigella seeds or Urfa chile flakes, to sprinkle (optional)

method: Serve this as soon as you’ve mixed it together. The cucumber will make it watery if it sits around for too long. The dressing can be made up to 2 days in advance.
